case_title: IO FONG VS. JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES, INC DBA FITNESS SF

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED FEB-12-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES, INC DBA FITNESS SF
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AFTER HEARING.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES, INC DBA FITNESS SF
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD 4/18/22. ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES, INC DBA FITNESS SF-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,390.00 FILED BY FONG, IO AS TO DEFENDANT JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES, INC DBA FITNESS SF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS, AFTER HEARING, DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO SEEK ARBITRATION. PLAINTIFF IO FONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA FITNESS SF IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DON DICKERSON, VICE PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
